item.title: AEC RUMMAGE SALE - 05/12/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/16/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Drop off May 12 & 13, 9:00 AM -3:30 PM. Come in and shop May 14 & 15, 8:30 AM - 3:30 PM & May 16, 8:30 AM-11:30 AM $1 BAG DAY

item.yodel:media_alt_text: AEC RUMMAGE SALE on May 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include $1 bag day and community event.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: SAS Customer Appreciation SALES! on May 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include kuebler shoes and sale.

item.title: Grey Days by New Balance & Kuebler Shoes - 05/12/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/26/2026 5:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 191 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us to CELEBRATE GREY = the defining expression of New Balance. Special sales vary throughout the month!
item.dc:creator: Kuebler Shoes
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Grey Days by New Balance & Kuebler Shoes on May 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include new balance and special sales.

item.title: LIFEGUARDING COURSE - 05/15/2026 12:00am EDT to 05/17/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Ready to make a difference this summer? 🌊☀️

Become a certified lifeguard and gain the skills to save lives, build confidence, and become a leader!

Important Details:

MAY 15-17, 2026

Friday 4p-8p, Saturday 8a-5p, & Sunday 8a-5p

• Blended course format – 7 hours of online coursework must be completed before the first day of class

• Swim assessment required one week prior to the first class- Friday at 6pm

• Attendance is mandatory for all scheduled days (no make-up sessions)

• Registration closes one week before the class begins

• Limited to just 8 students per class – reserve your spot early!

Don’t wait—spots fill fast! 📅 Enroll now at the Tiffin Community YMCA and dive into a new opportunity!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc
item.yodel:media_alt_text: LIFEGUARDING COURSE on May 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including teen and Classes/Workshops.

item.title: Gathered Mom’s Market! - 05/16/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/16/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1925 W County Rd 26, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA There is something really special about women coming together with a shared purpose. We’re so excited to introduce the Gathered Moms Market, a space where local, mom-owned businesses can come together, be celebrated, and be supported by our community. This market will be held alongside a donation-based garage sale fundraiser as part of a local family’s adoption journey, making every purchase and every visit part of something so much bigger. You’ll find everything from handmade goods to baked treats, thoughtful gifts, and unique finds… all created by talented local moms. Mark your calendar and come spend the day with us! May 16th starting at 9 AM Fitch Homestead Farmstand Vendor spots are limited! Message me for details!
item.dc:creator: Fitch Homestead Farmstand
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Gathered Mom’s Market! on May 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community support and family's adoption journey.

item.title: Tiffin Moose Lodge Monthly All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet - 05/16/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/16/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1146 OH-53, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Saturday May 16th: It's our MONTHLY All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet! Spread the word folks! 9 a.m.-11. Open to the public. $10. The social quarters will open
item.dc:creator: The Tiffin Moose - Lodge 846
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin Moose Lodge Monthly All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet on May 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include breakfast buffet and public event.

item.title: 4-H Natural Resource Clinic—Birds - 05/16/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/16/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Ohio 4-H and the Seneca County Parks are joining together to offer activities and experiences about birds—identification, houses and nests, migration, anatomy and flight. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Poker Night at the Fire Station! - 05/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/17/2026 12:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 120 Catherine St, Green Springs, OH 44836, USA Saturday Nov 8th Proceeds benefit the Independence day celebration! Doors open: 5pm cards play: 6pm No late entries! $30 buy in unlimited buy backs for first 3 rounds $10 buy-up for after 3rd round blinds double every 30 minutes bring a new player, you and them get an additional $100 in chips Starting stack $1k beer, pop, food will be available for purchase Pre-register and pay by 11/5 for an additional $100 in chips no late registrations after 6pm must be 18 call/ text 419-307-3675 to register Paypal and Square app Available for online payment through the fire department accounts. Only pay through posts from our page and NO OTHERS!
item.dc:creator: Village of Green Springs Independence Day Celebration Committee
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Poker Night at the Fire Station! on May 16, 2026 in Green Springs, OH. Featured themes include $30 buy-in and 18+ age requirement.

item.title: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church - 05/17/2026 9:30am EDT to 05/17/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 9:30am-10:30am Sunday School Classes for Toddlers, Kids, Youth, and Adults on Sunday mornings that study the Bible and talk about applying it to our lives. 10:30am Worship followed by Sunday Service. 10:50am Online, worship at home and join us on Facebook or YouTube at 10:50am live, or watch later at your convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church on May 17, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Calvert High School Glass Students Present “Pieces of Us” Glass Art Show and Sale - 05/17/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/17/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 227 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Calvert High School’s glass art students Sydney Michaels, Zane Thallman, Cash Lee, Morgan Peiffer, Wesley Hickman, Lukas Stultz invite the community to attend “Pieces of Us,” a unique glass art show and sale showcasing student creativity and craftsmanship. The event will take place on **Sunday, May 17, from 12:00 p.m. to 3:00 p.m. **at The Poignon Project 227 E, Perry St. Tiffin, OH and is open to the public. Guests can enjoy light snacks and drinks while exploring a variety of handcrafted glass pieces created by students. A highlight of the afternoon will be a live flame-working competition from 12:30 p.m. to 1:30 p.m., where students will compete in multiple categories in a judged glassblowing-style event, demonstrating their skills and artistry in real time. All student artwork will be available for purchase, with 50% of proceeds going to each student and 50% of proceeds benefiting Calvert Catholic Schools. Funds raised will support the 2026–2027 glassblowing class and help offset the cost of a planned educational field trip. Please note that sales are cash only. This event offers a meaningful opportunity to support student artists while experiencing the beauty and intricacy of glass art up close. Event Details: Pieces of Us Date: Sunday, May 17, 2026 Time: 12:00 p.m. – 3:00 p.m. Location: The Poignon Project 227 E Perry St., Tiffin, OH� Admission: Free and open to the public For more information, please contact The Poignon Project 419-618-6429
item.dc:creator: Calvert Catholic Schools
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Calvert High School Glass Students Present “Pieces of Us” Glass Art Show and Sale on May 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Arts and Causes.

item.title: Calvert High School Glass Students Present “Pieces of Us” Glass Art Show and Sale - 05/17/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/17/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 227 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Calvert High School Glass Students Present “Pieces of Us” Glass Art Show and Sale Calvert High School’s glass art students Sydney Michaels, Zane Thallman, Cash Lee, Morgan Peiffer, Wesley Hickman, Lukas Stultz invite the community to attend “Pieces of Us,” a unique glass art show and sale showcasing student creativity and craftsmanship. The event will take place on **Sunday, May 17, from 12:00 p.m. to 3:00 p.m. **at The Poignon Project 227 E, Perry St. Tiffin, OH and is open to the public. Guests can enjoy light snacks and drinks while exploring a variety of handcrafted glass pieces created by students. A highlight of the afternoon will be a live flame-working competition from 12:30 p.m. to 1:30 p.m., where students will compete in multiple categories in a judged glassblowing-style event, demonstrating their skills and artistry in real time. All student artwork will be available for purchase, with 50% of proceeds going to each student and 50% of proceeds benefiting Calvert Catholic Schools. Funds raised will support the 2026–2027 glassblowing class and help offset the cost of a planned educational field trip. Please note that sales are cash only. This event offers a meaningful opportunity to support student artists while experiencing the beauty and intricacy of glass art up close. Event Details:�Title: Pieces of Us�Date: Sunday, May 17�Time: 12:00 p.m. – 3:00 p.m.�Location: The Poignon Project 227 E, Perry St. Tiffin, OH�Admission: Free and open to the public For more information, please contact The Poignon Project 419-618-6429
item.dc:creator: The Poignon Project
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Calvert High School Glass Students Present “Pieces of Us” Glass Art Show and Sale on May 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include art show and community.

item.title: Mothers Day High Tea & Brunch - 05/17/2026 1:00pm EDT to 05/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Celebrate Mother’s Day with an exquisite High Tea Brunch on May 17th from 1 PM to 3 PM. Enjoy a delightful experience filled with delicious treats and warm moments perfect for honoring the special moms in your life.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mothers Day High Tea & Brunch on May 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include high tea and honoring.

item.title: Let's Talk About It - 05/18/2026 10:30am EDT to 05/18/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin Seneca Public Library will host their adult book discussion group, “Let’s Talk About It” on Monday, May 18 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. The group will discuss Three Days in June by Anne Tyler. Copies of the book are available at the Library. All are invited to join the free event; no registration is necessary. Refreshments will be provided. For more information, call the Library at 419-447-3751 or go to the online calendar at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Let's Talk About It on May 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free event and library.

item.title: Plant Swap - 05/18/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/18/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host a “Plant Swap” on Monday, May 18 from 12:00 to 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Drop-in anytime between 12:00 and 6:00 p.m. to leave extra plants that are looking for a new home, or to take something new home. Please bring plants in soil or water. The Library will provide extra pots and soil. Suggestions of plants to bring are house plants, outdoor plants, starts, bulbs, and seeds. Please bring as much detail on the plant as possible, such as instructions for planting, or whether it requires sun or shade. Registration is not required for this free adult program. Plants can be dropped off at the Information Desk beginning at 9:30 a.m. For more information, call the Library at 419-447-3751 or visit www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Plant Swap on May 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include plant swap and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Stay & Play - 05/18/2026 1:30pm EDT to 05/18/2026 2:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Stay & Play lasts for 30-45 Minutes, includes unstructured creative play, and is best suited for babies thru age 5. No registration required. New friends are always welcome.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Stay & Play on May 18, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include unstructured play and Kids & Family.

item.title: PLT MONTHLY MEETING - 05/18/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/18/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1202 H L Ford Dr, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Come and join a great group while we discuss on-going fundraisers and event planning for Fostoria Elementary school.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Elementary Parent Lighthouse Team
item.yodel:media_alt_text: PLT MONTHLY MEETING on May 18, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include community engagement and event planning.

item.title: Young Adventurers—MUD Kitchen - 05/18/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/18/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA For ages 5 to 12 years.  Join Linda Rose in the kitchen as we create some awesome mud recipes.  Dress to get a little dirty. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Young Adventurers—MUD Kitchen on May 18, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include mud kitchen and registration required.

item.title: Fostoria Women Empowering Women - 05/18/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/18/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Ladies 18+ — Join us for Fostoria Women Empowering Women! May 18 | 5:30–7:30 PM Geary Family YMCA Annex, Fostoria Inspire • Educate • Connect Bring a friend! Dinner and childcare provided. RSVP: 419-435-2555
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Fostoria Women Empowering Women on May 18, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include women empowering women and Health & Fitness.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 05/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/18/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on May 18, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fellowship and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Wings & Reconnection Scouting Alumni Event - 05/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/18/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 100 S Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Wings & Reconnection Scouting Alumni Event, where you can enjoy great wings, share memorable stories, and support a great cause. This is an opportunity to reconnect with fellow Eagle Scouts, past Scouters, parents, leaders, and community supporters who cherish the values of Scouting. The event will take place at Buffalo Wild Wings in Tiffin, Ohio, on [insert date] from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM. We are excited to welcome Guest Speaker Eagle Scout Samuel Faber from 6:00 PM to 6:30 PM. Thanks to the generosity of Tiffin Buffalo Wild Wings and Cris Lewis-Thrivent, this event is free for all attendees. Drop in anytime!
item.dc:creator: Arrowwood District, Scouting America
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Wings & Reconnection Scouting Alumni Event on May 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community supporters and eagle scouts.

item.title: Laundry Day - 05/19/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/19/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month, Tuesday, May 5th and 19th, 9am-3pm. Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/.../10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25...
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Laundry Day on May 19, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include laundry services and Causes.

item.title: Storytime - 05/19/2026 10:30am EDT to 05/19/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Storytime on May 19, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include storytime and Kids & Family.

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 05/19/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/19/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday on May 19, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teens and tiffin, ohio.

Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday on May 19, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teen tuesdays and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Dirty Soda Bar - 05/19/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/19/2026 6:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Registration required. Registration will open two weeks prior to the event. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dirty Soda Bar on May 19, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include registration and Food & Drink.

item.title: Project WET FREE Educator Workshop - 05/20/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/20/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA FREE workshop for formal and informal educators Project Wet (Water Education for Today) is hands-on and multiple interdisciplinary curriculum guides with over 60 water quality and quantity activities for grades K-12. The original guide was produced in 1995 and has changed many times over the years. Educators at this workshop will receive Water in Earth Systems and Foundations of Water Education Guides plus other resources produced by Project WET. Funding for the workshop guides is provided by ee360+ funding through NAAEE. Come learn, have fun, and make connections with other water educators. To register email dennis.clement@epa.ohio.gov. For additional information email Dennis or call 614.644.2048.
item.dc:creator: Ohio Environmental Protection Agency
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Project WET FREE Educator Workshop on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include k-12 and project wet.

item.title: Teen Art Club - 05/20/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Teen Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public library will host “Teen Art Club” on Wednesdays, May 6 and 20 from 3:00 to 4:30 p.m. in the Teen Area. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to get creative with other artsy teens. Teens are encouraged to bring their own drawings and projects or just drop by to explore a new project. The Library will provide craft supplies and the opportunity to learn new arts and crafts skills. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Art Club on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Clubs.

item.title: AJ Heavenly Pizza Fundraiser - 05/20/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Please come to the fundraiser at AJ's Pizza - good food for a good cause. Thank you!
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: AJ Heavenly Pizza Fundraiser on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fundraiser and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: A Walk in the Arts - 05/20/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Take “A Walk in the Arts” at Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Wednesday, May 20 from 4:00 to 5:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Learn about a different famous artist each month and create a piece of art inspired by what you discover. Projects designed for children in second through fourth grade. Registration is not required. For more information please visit www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: A Walk in the Arts on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include children and community.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 05/20/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on May 20, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include childcare not provided and fostoria church.

item.title: Jim Wahlberg - A Redemptive Life Story - 05/20/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1015 Race St, Clyde, OH 43410, USA Jim offers a passionate and personal testimony of his redemptive life from being an imprisoned drug addicted adolescent to encountering one of the greatest saints of all time at his lowest point, ultimately turning his life around. Join us at the Clyde High School Auditorium 6:00 pm Doors open 6:30 Pm - 7:30 PM Speaking 7:30 PM - 8:00 PM Book signing and refreshments
item.dc:creator: Mental Health and Recovery Services Board of Seneca, Ottawa, Sandusky and Wyandot
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Jim Wahlberg - A Redemptive Life Story on May 20, 2026 in Clyde, OH. Featured themes include clyde, ohio and mental health.

item.title: Balance Nutrition Fundraiser Bellevue Historical Society - 05/21/2026 7:00am EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 108 E Main St, Bellevue, OH 44811, USA Balance Nutrition is hosting a fundriaser for the Bellevue Historical Society. Special Tremont drink will be available that day, extra $1 will go to the Bellevue Historical Society when purchasing the drink.
item.dc:creator: Tremont House
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Balance Nutrition Fundraiser Bellevue Historical Society on May 21, 2026 in Bellevue, OH. Featured themes include fundraiser and nutrition.

item.title: MST Food Truck - 05/21/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/21/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA MST Food Truck will be in the front parking lot of St. Francis Home on Thursday, May 21st from 10am-2pm. Come out and get some good eats!

item.title: Storytime - 05/21/2026 11:45am EDT to 05/21/2026 12:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Storytime on May 21, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include stories and storytime.

item.title: 2026 Art in the Park: Plein Air Gatherings - 05/21/2026 2:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Aeraland Recreational Area, 1220 Township Rd 243, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Plein Air Gatherings are an opportunity for artists to get together and paint or draw outdoors “en plein air” in Hancock County parks. All adult artists who use any medium conducive to working outdoors are welcome. If you are new to plein air painting or are hesitant to go out on your own, these gatherings are a perfect opportunity to meet and work with other plein air artists. Please join us for our 13th season! You should plan to bring whatever supplies and equipment you need and dress for ground and weather conditions. There is no fee or registration. It is not necessary to attend every session – come when you can. In case of rain, the session is cancelled. Gatherings will be held weekly on Thursdays. For more information or questions, please contact volunteer coordinator Sharon Hammer Baker at bakerartstudio@gmail.com or HPD Program Specialist Tim Kleman at tkleman@hancockparks.com.
item.dc:creator: Hancock Park District
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Art in the Park: Plein Air Gatherings on May 21, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include art supplies and community.

item.title: Brick Builders Club - 05/21/2026 4:30pm EDT to 05/21/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Brick Builders Club is Open to All Ages; Families are Encouraged to Attend Together. No Registration is Required & You Do Not Need to Make Every Meeting to be Part of the Club!
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Brick Builders Club on May 21, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include attend together and attica, ohio.

item.title: Barking Lot Party - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin - 05/21/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a paw-some evening in Downtown Tiffin on Thursday, May 21, 2026, from 5 to 8 PM! Enjoy a pet-friendly night out with your furry friends as you stroll through downtown and discover a pet-friendly experience throughout the downtown district. Stay tuned for more details and a list of participating businesses! If your dog is aggressive toward other dogs, children, or strangers, we kindly ask that you leave them at home. All dogs must be leashed, and owners are responsible for bringing doggie bags and cleaning up after their pets. Mark your calendars and plan to join us for a fun and pet-friendly evening in Downtown Tiffin!
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Barking Lot Party - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Festivals/Fairs.

item.title: TU Comes to You: Cincinnati - 05/21/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come reconnect with fellow alumni and friends for a fun and relaxed evening at one of Cincinnati’s most iconic breweries. For $35 per person, your registration includes a guided brewery tour, delicious food, and a pint while you catch up with the TU community and hear the latest updates from campus. Whether you’re looking to reconnect with old friends, meet fellow Dragons in the area, or simply enjoy a great night out, this is an event you won’t want to miss. Space is limited, so be sure to reserve your spot today! Date: May 21, 2026 Time: 6:00 – 8:00 p.m. Location: Rhinegeist Brewery 1910 Elm St. Cincinnati, OH 45202 Register at http://tiffin.edu/.../events/tu-comes-to-you-cincinnati/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University Alumni & Friends
item.yodel:media_alt_text: TU Comes to You: Cincinnati on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include brewery and cincinnati.

item.title: Little Dreamers Pajama Storytime - 05/21/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Little Dreamers Pajama Storytime” on Thursday, May 21 at 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Kids age birth to 3 years old and their families are invited to wear their favorite pajamas, bring a stuffed animal, and enjoy bedtime stories, songs and a relaxing wind-down before bed. For more information, please stop by the Junior Library or call (419) 447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Little Dreamers Pajama Storytime on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include families and pajama storytime.
